nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 恰帕斯州
nodes.summary: 恰帕斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联34种鸟类，包括角冠雉、小灰頭稚冠雉、眼斑吐綬雞等34种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Yellow-throated nightingale-thrush
nodes.summary: Yellow-throated nightingale-thrush（Yellow-throated nightingale-thrush，学名 Catharus dryas），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于瓦哈卡州、恰帕斯州、Pine–oak forest，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: Pine–oak forest
nodes.summary: Pine–oak forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联32种鸟类，包括Mottled owl、白喉蓝头鹊、小蓝头鹊等32种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 瓦哈卡州
nodes.summary: 瓦哈卡州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联43种鸟类，包括灰胸穴䳍、角冠雉、Long-tailed wood partridge等43种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: harrisoni is found in the southwestern Mexican state of Oaxaca

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: ovandensis is found in the southern Mexican state of Chiapas. The nominate subspecies C

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Another is in northern El Salvador and western Honduras and a third is in central Honduras. Other sources show a continuous range from Oaxaca through southern Guatemala, exclude the central Honduras population, and add a small range in extreme northwestern Nicaragua. The yellow-throated nightingale-thrush primarily inhabits humid tropical and subtropical forest where it favors damp ravines and areas along forest streams. South of Mexico it also inhabits pine-oak forest and higher-elevation coffee plantations. One source defines its elevational range as R

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The largest threat posed stems from deforestation and the resultant loss of suitable habitat." On source considers it "locally fairly common" overall, "uncommon to rare" in Honduras, and almost unknown in Nicaragua. Another calls it common in northern Central America (Guatemala, El Salvador, and Honduras) without country-by-country detail
